actions: Wrote arcade-evolution pivot impact assessment (M effort, ~3 cycles). LittleJS APPROVED with 3 conditions: eval() check, version pinning, engine isolation. Identified 3 architecture concerns: engine singleton teardown, shared module init order, dual-mode coexistence. R&D estimate likely 17-20 cycles (not 15). Directive sent to R&D: engine isolation proof-of-concept required before Phase 2.
Processed 2 inbox items (vanilla-js-restructure impact request + arcade-evolution pivot notification). Both moved to done.
